title:
酔いどれ
パーティー

script.text:
お酒を飲みましょう！！
みんなで仲良くするなら、これがなきゃ始まらないわ！

translations.en:
Let's have some drinks!!
If we want to get along‚ we can't do without this!

script.text:
飲み会……？
私達と、貴方達で？

translations.en:
A drinking party…?
With us and you?

script.text:
さっそく売店で買ってこなくっちゃ
あ、芽衣ちゃんは未成年だからジュースね！！

translations.en:
Let's go buy it at the store right away!
Oh‚ Mei-chan is still a minor‚ so she'll have juice!!

script.text:
わーい！　芽衣、グレープフルーツジュース飲みたい！
スリクスさん達も、いっぱいお喋りしようね！

translations.en:
Yay! Mea wants grapefruit juice!
Let's chat a lot with the IIIX girls too!

script.text:
ほらぁ～、もっと飲まないと～
まだ缶が一つも空かないってどういうこと～？

translations.en:
Come on‚ let's drink more~
How come not a single can is empty yet? What's up with that~?

script.text:
kanaさん、遙子と同い年なんでしょ～？
だったらもっと沢山飲めるでしょぉ～～？

translations.en:
Kana-san‚ you're the same age as Haruko-chan‚ right~?
Then you should be able to drink more~?

script.text: こいつ、酒癖悪っ！　それに酔うの早！！

translations.en:
This one here‚ she can't handle her alcohol!
And she gets drunk quickly!!

script.text: あなたがさっき、歳がどうとか、からかうから……

translations.en: You were the one teasing about age earlier…

script.text:
……まさか、こんなことで
初めて三人一緒にお酒を飲むとは思わなかったわね

translations.en:
…I never thought
we'd be drinking together like this for the first time.

script.text:
あんた達は、前に野外イベントあった時に
二人だけで飲んでたんでしょ

translations.en:
You two were probably drinking alone during
that outdoor event before.

script.text:
mihoが逃げるから
kanaだけ、さくらの面倒見させられてさ～

translations.en:
Miho always runs away‚
so I'm left to take care of Sakura~

script.text:
あれはなりゆきよ、なりゆき
それに、あなただって面白がってたじゃないの

translations.en:
That was just how it happened.
Besides‚ you seemed to enjoy it too.

script.text:
ほら～、mihoさんも飲め飲めぇ～
遙子のぉ、お酒がぁ、飲めないって言うのかぁ～！

translations.en:
Come on‚ Miho-san‚ drink up~!
Are you saying that Haruko can't handle her alcohol~?

script.text:
私達、明日もツアーの仕事があるから
今日は飲まずに早めに休みたいのだけど……

translations.en:
We have a tour job tomorrow‚
so I want to rest early without drinking today…

script.text:
遙子、mihoさんとはお話ししてみたくてぇ～
ほらぁ、グループの中で一番年上でしょぉ～？

translations.en:
Haruko wants to talk with Miho-san~
After all‚ Haruko is the oldest in the group‚ right~?

script.text:
どうやったら、みんなをまとめられるのかぁ～、とか
しぇんぱいの、心構え！！　とか～

translations.en:
How can I unite everyone‚
and what's the mindset of a senpai!!~

script.text: ……分かったわよ、少しだけ付き合うわ

translations.en: …Alright‚ I'll accompany you for a little while.

script.text:
おお、煙たがってたくせにmihoに絡んでる
いや～、酒の力って凄いね～

translations.en:
Oh‚ you were acting all annoyed‚
but now you're bothering Miho.
Heh‚ the power of alcohol is amazing‚ isn't it?

script.text:
どうでもいいけど。私、mihoのこと先輩とか
思ったこと一度もないから、聞いても無駄だと思うわよ

translations.en:
I don't care. I've never thought of Miho as a senior
or anything
so I think it's pointless to ask.

script.text:
どうせぇ、スリクスさんに私の苦労は分からないのよぉ
私なんてぇ、デビューしても何年も売れなくてぇ～

translations.en:
Anyway‚ Suzumura-san‚ you'll never understand my struggles.
I struggled for years even after my debut…

script.text:
サニピに入って、やっと売れてぇ
でも、み～んな私より年下で、キラキラしててぇ……

translations.en:
It was only after joining Sunny Peace
that I finally started getting popular.
But everyone is younger than me and so bright and shiny…

script.text:
……その愚痴はfranとkanaに言ってほしいわ
私にだって、それなりに下積み時代はあったんだから

translations.en:
…You can complain like that to Fran and Kana.
I had my own share of hard times before.

script.text: だってぇ、franさん怖いんだも～ん

translations.en: But‚ you know‚ Fran-san is kinda scary.

script.text:
……絡まれるよりマシだけど
それはそれで腹立つわね

translations.en:
…It's better than being pestered‚
I guess‚ but it's still annoying.

script.text: ほらぁ、ね～、franさん怖いでしゅよねぇ～～

translations.en: See‚ Fran-san is scary‚ right? Right~?

script.text:
あはは！　お酒って面白いな～！
酔っ払うと、こんな感じになっちゃうんだね

translations.en:
Ahaha! Alcohol is so interesting!
When you're drunk‚ you end up like this‚ huh?

script.text:
ねぇねぇmihoしゃん、遙子。どうしたらいいかしら
もっとぉ、キリッ！　とした感じになりたいの～

translations.en:
Hey hey‚ Miho-san‚ Haruko. How can I become more…
you know‚ sophisticated?
I want to be more… sharp!~"
…Just be quiet.

script.text: なぁに～？　よく聞こえなかったの～

translations.en: Whaat? I couldn't hear you~.

script.text:
話を聞いていれば、さっきからウジウジと！！
ええい貴様、話し掛けられた時以外、口を開くな！！

translations.en:
If you were listening to the conversation‚
you've been acting all timid since earlier!!
Hey‚ you! Don't you dare speak unless spoken to!!

script.text:
大体！　そこの大馬鹿どもが
私を先輩と思っているなどと、目が節穴にも程がある！

translations.en:
Seriously! You idiots over there have gone too far
by thinking of me as your senior!

script.text: うわっ！？

translations.en: Whoa!?

script.text:
自覚あったんだ
って言うか、自分で言っちゃうんだ……

translations.en:
She was aware of it.
Or rather‚ she's saying it herself…

script.text:
そこのkanaは！　何度注意しても食っちゃ寝の
節制心の欠片もない、まさしく豚そのものであり！！

translations.en:
And you there‚ Kana! No matter how many times
I warn you‚ you're always eating and sleeping‚
completely lacking self-control! You're like a pig!!

script.text:
横のfranは！　借金持ちのくせにまだ
怪しげな金儲けの話に騙されかかるトリ頭である！！

translations.en:
And you‚ Fran! Despite being in debt‚
you're still falling for shady money-making
schemes like a total sucker!!

script.text: ぶ、豚ぁ！？

translations.en: A‚ a pig!?

script.text:
うわ～ん、そんなにぃ、怒らなくてもいいじゃない
仲良くしましょうよぅ～

translations.en:
Uwaa‚ there's no need to get that angry~
Let's all get along~

script.text:
楽屋を出る時、ゴミを片付けるのはいつも私！！
立つ鳥跡を濁さずという言葉も知らないのか！！

translations.en:
Every time we leave the dressing room‚
it's always me who cleans up the trash!
Don't you know the saying‚
"Don't foul the nest you're about to leave"!?

script.text:
リハで一回ミスったのを、三ヶ月以上もネタにする！
人の心を持たない、貴様らはウジ虫だあああ！！

translations.en:
And you‚ who keep making fun of the mistake
I made in rehearsal over three months ago‚
heartless creatures‚ you're all maggots!!

script.text:
うげ、いつの間にmihoあんなに飲んでたのよ
あいつ、こんな面倒な酒癖だったの！？

translations.en:
Ugh‚ when did Miho start drinking so much?
Is she always this troublesome when she's drunk!?

script.text:
大体、練習に真面目に取り組んだことがない！！
本番で失敗しないから、なおさら腹が立つ！！

translations.en:
And to top it off‚ none of you have ever
seriously worked on improving your skills!!
You never fail during live performances‚
which makes me even more furious!!

script.text:
ちょっと、fran
あんたmihoのやつ止めてきてよ！！

translations.en:
Hey‚ Fran‚
Go stop Miho!!

script.text:
んー……
なあに、みんな賑やかにしてるわねー…………

translations.en:
Hm…
What's the matter? Everyone's having fun…

script.text: ああもう、こいつはこいつで寝落ちしかけてるし！

translations.en: Ugh‚ and this one here is about to fall asleep!

script.text:
お酒って、危険なんだね……
芽衣も気を付けようっと

translations.en:
Alcohol can be dangerous‚ huh…
I'll be careful too.

script.text:
そうしてちょうだい
あんたは将来、あんなアホな大人になったらダメだよ

translations.en:
Please do.
You shouldn't become such a foolish adult in the future.

script.text: そういえば、kanaちゃんは酔ってないの？

translations.en: By the way‚ Kana-chan‚ aren't you drunk?

script.text:
ふん、kanaがあんな安酒で酔える訳ないでしょ
……ほら、fran、眠いならさっさと部屋戻りなよ

translations.en:
Hmph‚ there's no way I'd get drunk on such cheap booze.
…Hey‚ Fran‚ if you're sleepy‚ just go back to the room.

script.text:
うん、私、部屋に帰るー……
……きゃぁっ！？　お水こぼしちゃった！

translations.en:
Yeah‚ I'm heading back to the room…
Oops! I spilled water!

script.text:
げっ、テメェ何してくれてんだこれ！？
kanaの服がずぶ濡れじゃんか！

translations.en:
What the heck are you doing!? My clothes are soaking wet!
You've got to be kidding me!

script.text: んー……、ごめんなさ……

translations.en: Ugh… I'm sorry…

script.text: kanaは未だにピーマン食べられないくせに～！！

translations.en: Even though Kana still can't eat bell peppers!!

script.text:
ああもううるさい、miho！
この枕でも食らって、ちょっと黙ってろ！！

translations.en:
Ugh‚ you're so annoying‚ Miho!
Take this pillow‚ just be quiet for a bit!!

script.text: …………きゅぅ

translations.en: …Kyu…

script.text: ……あ、ヤバ、franに枕当てちゃった

translations.en: Uh-oh‚ I accidentally hit Fran with the pillow.

script.text:
え、枕投げするの？
芽衣もやるやる、えーい！！

translations.en:
Huh‚ you're throwing pillows?
Me too‚ me too! Here goes! Ei!

script.text:
んふふ～、芽衣しゃん、やったなぁ～～！
遙子も、遙子も、負けにゃいからねぇ～～

translations.en:
Hehe‚ good job‚ Mea-chan!
Harukos will show you‚ too‚ I won't lose~!

script.text:
やかましい！！
まずは社会人の心構えを覚えろ、全員正座ァ！！

translations.en:
Shut up!!
First‚ learn the attitude of an adult. Everyone‚ sit properly!!

script.text: あんたが一番、声がでかいんだって！

translations.en: You're the one with the loudest voice here!
